rs28358292.description: Defining marker for mtDNA Haplogroup L3e, common in Central and West Africa.

rs2032605.description: Defining marker for Y-DNA Haplogroup E1b1a1, the major Sub-Saharan paternal lineage.

rs10456425.description: Deep ancestry marker for Yoruba populations.

rs10456426.description: Deep ancestry marker for Igbo populations.

rs10456430.description: Deep ancestry marker for San populations.

rs10456431.description: Deep ancestry marker for Hadza populations.

rs10456432.description: Deep ancestry marker for Mbuti populations.

rs334.description: The sickle cell mutation (HbS) is common in West African populations as it provides protection against malaria in its heterozygous form (AS).

rs2032582.description: A variant in the multi-drug resistance gene that shows high differentiation between African and non-African populations.

rs41525747_afr.description: Lactase Persistence G-14010 Variant - associated with pastoralist heritage in East Africa (Maasai, Cushitic populations).

rs12149629_afr.description: Horn of Africa Ancestry Marker - diagnostic for Cushitic and Semitic-speaking populations of East Africa.

rs12149630_afr.description: Nilotic Core Marker - highly diagnostic for Nilo-Saharan speaking populations of the Upper Nile and East Africa.
